description: Call GET /api/v1/google/shorts/search for Google SERP Shorts Search through Just Serp API with query.

operations.description: Get Google shorts Search data, including video metadata and rankings, for short-form content tracking and trend analysis.

parameters.description: The search query for Google Shorts (e.g., 'cooking tips', 'travel hacks').
parameters.name: query

parameters.description: The result offset to skip a specific number of entries (e.g., set to 12 to skip the first 12 results).
parameters.name: start

parameters.description: Set to true to return the raw HTML of the Google search results page alongside the structured data.
parameters.name: html

parameters.description: Set the target country code (e.g., 'us', 'uk') to localize results. See Google Countries.
parameters.name: country

parameters.description: The Google domain to use for the search (e.g., 'google.com', 'google.co.uk'). See Google Domains.
parameters.name: domain

parameters.description: Set the language for the results using its two-letter code (e.g., 'en' for English, 'fr' for French). See Google Language.
parameters.name: language

parameters.description: Restrict results to one or more languages using the 'lang_{language_code}' format (e.g., 'lang_en'). See Google LR Language.
parameters.name: lr

parameters.description: Encoded location string (UULE) used to precisely localize Google search results. This is an advanced/technical parameter — if you’re not familiar with it, you can leave it empty and omit it.
parameters.name: uule

parameters.description: Advanced search filter parameter (tbs) used to apply Google result filters (e.g. time range). This is an advanced parameter — if you’re not familiar with it, you can leave it empty.
parameters.name: tbs

parameters.description: SafeSearch filter setting. Set to 'active' to filter adult content, or 'off' to disable it.
parameters.name: safe

parameters.description: Controls Google's auto-correction. Set to '1' to exclude corrected results, '0' to include them.
parameters.name: nfpr

responses.description: Authentication failed: API Key is invalid or missing
Access denied: Insufficient credits or quota exceeded
Internal server error or upstream service exception
